title: Vashantor
description: Large-scale multilingual benchmark for dialect→standard Bangla machine translation. Covers five regional dialects with parallel corpora, baseline models, and evaluation scripts.

title: ANCHOLIK-NER
description: Benchmark dataset for Named Entity Recognition in five Bangla regional dialects. Developed under the IRT/SEU institutional grant (REG-NER project). Under review at PLOS ONE (Q1).

title: Stock Transformer (DSE)
description: Transformer + Time2Vec architecture for stock price forecasting on the Dhaka Stock Exchange. Includes an open historical dataset, full code, and published results in World Scientific IJCIA.

title: BIDWESH
description: Bangla regional hate speech detection dataset covering dialectal variation in hateful content. Addresses a critical gap in low-resource language safety research.

title: VR-FuseNet
description: Fusion of heterogeneous fundus image data with explainable deep learning for diabetic retinopathy classification. Under review at Biomedical Materials and Devices (Springer, Q2).

title: Brain MRI XAI
description: Comparative study of Vision Transformers and CNN architectures with Grad-CAM interpretability for brain disease detection and multi-class abnormality diagnosis on Bangladeshi MRI data.

title: Bangla Dialect Identification
description: BERT, large language models, and XAI applied to Bangla regional dialect detection. Published at IEEE COMPAS 2024.
